sentences.target: C’est le voisin auquel je pense.

translations.fr: C’est le voisin auquel je pense.
translations.en: That’s the neighbor I’m thinking of.
translations.es: Ese es el vecino en quien estoy pensando.
translations.de: Das ist der Nachbar, an den ich denke.
translations.it: È il vicino a cui sto pensando.
translations.zh-Hans: 那就是我正在想的那位邻居。
translations.yue: 嗰個就係我諗緊嗰位鄰居。
translations.ru: Это тот сосед, о котором я думаю.
translations.pt: Esse é o vizinho em quem estou pensando.
translations.vi: Đó là người hàng xóm mà tôi đang nghĩ đến.
translations.ar: هذا هو الجار الذي أفكر فيه.
translations.nl: Dat is de buurman aan wie ik denk.
translations.uk: Це той сусід, про якого я думаю.
translations.hu: Ez az a szomszéd, akire gondolok.
translations.hi: वह वही पड़ोसी है जिसके बारे में मैं सोच रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: To ten sąsiad, o którym myślę.
translations.el: Αυτός είναι ο γείτονας που σκέφτομαι.
translations.nb: Det er naboen jeg tenker på.
translations.sv: Det är grannen som jag tänker på.
translations.ro: Acela este vecinul la care mă gândesc.
translations.cs: To je ten soused, na kterého myslím.
translations.da: Det er naboen, jeg tænker på.
translations.fi: Se on se naapuri, jota ajattelen.
translations.ja: それが私が思っている近所の人です.

tokens.explanation: Copular/presentative: clitic pronoun ‘ce’ is attached to ‘est’ (présent de l’indicatif) to introduce the predicate nominal.
Definite article, masculine singular, agreeing with ‘voisin’.
Common noun, masculine; antecedent of the relative pronoun ‘auquel’.
Relative pronoun = ‘à’ + ‘lequel’, masculine singular; introduces a relative clause required by ‘penser à’ and agrees with ‘voisin’.
1st person singular subject pronoun of the relative clause.
Présent de l’indicatif, 1st person singular; ‘penser’ selects the preposition ‘à’, which is carried by ‘auquel’.

sentences.target: Voilà le sujet auquel on s’intéresse.

translations.fr: Voilà le sujet auquel on s’intéresse.
translations.en: That’s the topic we’re interested in.
translations.es: Ese es el tema que nos interesa.
translations.de: Das ist das Thema, für das wir uns interessieren.
translations.zh-Hans: 这就是我们感兴趣的主题。
translations.yue: 呢個就係我哋感興趣嘅主題。
translations.pt: Esse é o assunto que nos interessa.
translations.vi: Đây là chủ đề mà chúng tôi quan tâm.
translations.ar: هذا هو الموضوع الذي نهتم به.
translations.nl: Dat is het onderwerp waar we in geïnteresseerd zijn.
translations.hu: Ez az a téma, ami érdekel minket.
translations.hi: यह वही विषय है जिसमें हमारी रुचि है.
translations.pl: To jest temat, który nas interesuje.
translations.el: Αυτό είναι το θέμα που μας ενδιαφέρει.
translations.nb: Det er temaet vi er interessert i.
translations.sv: Det är ämnet som vi är intresserade av.
translations.ro: Acesta este subiectul care ne interesează.
translations.cs: To je téma, které nás zajímá.
translations.da: Det er emnet, vi er interesserede i.
translations.fi: Tämä on aihe, joka kiinnostaa meitä.
translations.ja: それが私たちが関心を持っているテーマです.

tokens.explanation: Presentative adverb introducing the topic/NP.
Definite article, masculine singular, agreeing with ‘sujet’.
Common noun; antecedent of the relative pronoun ‘auquel’.
Relative pronoun = ‘à’ + ‘lequel’, masculine singular; required by the pronominal verb ‘s’intéresser à’, agreeing with ‘sujet’.
Indefinite personal pronoun functioning as subject (3rd person singular).
Pronominal verb ‘s’intéresser’ in présent de l’indicatif, 3rd person singular; reflexive clitic ‘se’ elided before vowel (s’). The verb governs ‘à’, supplied by ‘auquel’.

sentences.target: Tu connais le groupe auquel ils appartiennent.
sentences.reading: /ty kɔnɛ lə ɡʁup okɛl il zapɑʁtjɛn/

translations.fr: Tu connais le groupe auquel ils appartiennent.
translations.ipa: /ty kɔnɛ lə ɡʁup okɛl il zapɑʁtjɛn/
translations.en: Do you know the group they belong to?
translations.de: Kennst du die Gruppe, zu der sie gehören?
translations.it: Conosci il gruppo a cui appartengono?
translations.zh-Hans: 你知道他们属于哪个团体吗？
translations.yue: 你識唔識佢哋屬於邊個團體？
translations.ru: Ты знаешь, к какой группе они принадлежат?
translations.pt: Você conhece o grupo ao qual eles pertencem?
translations.he: אתה מכיר את הקבוצה שהם שייכים אליה?
translations.tr: Onların ait olduğu grubu biliyor musun?
translations.vi: Bạn có biết nhóm mà họ thuộc về không?
translations.ar: هل تعرف المجموعة التي ينتمون إليها؟
translations.nl: Ken je de groep waar ze bij horen?
translations.uk: Ти знаєш групу, до якої вони належать?
translations.hu: Ismered azt a csoportot, amelyhez tartoznak?
translations.hi: क्या तुम उस समूह को जानते हो जिससे वे संबंधित हैं?
translations.el: Ξέρεις την ομάδα στην οποία ανήκουν;
translations.id: Kamu tahu kelompok yang mereka tergabung dalam?
translations.sv: Känner du gruppen som de tillhör?
translations.da: Kender du gruppen, som de tilhører?
translations.ja: 彼らが所属しているグループを知っていますか？

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun.
Présent de l’indicatif, 2nd person singular.
Definite article, masculine singular, agreeing with ‘groupe’.
Common noun; antecedent of the relative pronoun ‘auquel’.
Relative pronoun = ‘à’ + ‘lequel’, masculine singular; required by ‘appartenir à’ and agrees with ‘groupe’.
3rd person plural subject pronoun of the relative clause.
Présent de l’indicatif, 3rd person plural; ‘appartenir’ selects ‘à’, which is realized in ‘auquel’.

sentences.target: Voici le match auquel nous assistons.

translations.fr: Voici le match auquel nous assistons.
translations.es: Este es el partido al que estamos asistiendo.
translations.de: Das ist das Spiel, das wir besuchen.
translations.it: Ecco la partita a cui stiamo assistendo.
translations.zh-Hans: 这就是我们正在观看的比赛。
translations.yue: 呢場就係我哋而家睇緊嘅比賽。
translations.ru: Это матч, на котором мы присутствуем.
translations.pt: Este é o jogo ao qual estamos assistindo.
translations.vi: Đây là trận đấu mà chúng tôi đang theo dõi.
translations.nl: Dit is de wedstrijd die we bijwonen.
translations.hu: Ez az a meccs, amit nézünk.
translations.hi: यह वही मैच है जिसे हम देख रहे हैं.
translations.el: Αυτός είναι ο αγώνας που παρακολουθούμε.
translations.nb: Dette er kampen vi er på.
translations.id: Ini adalah pertandingan yang kami tonton.
translations.sv: Det här är matchen som vi går på.
translations.ro: Acesta este meciul la care asistăm.
translations.ja: これが私たちが観戦している試合です.

tokens.explanation: Presentative adverb introducing the NP.
Definite article, masculine singular, agreeing with ‘match’.
Common noun; antecedent of the relative pronoun ‘auquel’.
Relative pronoun = ‘à’ + ‘lequel’, masculine singular; required by ‘assister à’ and agrees with ‘match’.
1st person plural subject pronoun of the relative clause.
Présent de l’indicatif, 1st person plural; ‘assister’ selects ‘à’, which is supplied by ‘auquel’.

jp: C’est le voisin auquel je pense.
Voilà le sujet auquel on s’intéresse.
Tu connais le groupe auquel ils appartiennent.
Voici le match auquel nous assistons.
fu: /ty kɔnɛ lə ɡʁup okɛl il zapɑʁtjɛn/
fr: C’est le voisin auquel je pense.
Voilà le sujet auquel on s’intéresse.
Tu connais le groupe auquel ils appartiennent.
Voici le match auquel nous assistons.
ipa: /ty kɔnɛ lə ɡʁup okɛl il zapɑʁtjɛn/
en: That’s the neighbor I’m thinking of.
That’s the topic we’re interested in.
Do you know the group they belong to?
